name: Infected Gnat

attacks.name: Disarming Boop
attacks.tell: It flies straight at the player’s hands and bumps them hard enough to make them drop what they are holding.
attacks.howToAvoid: Shoot it down or sidestep before it makes contact.
attacks.notes: It normally is not trying to deal direct damage; its value is in disarming you at the worst moment.

description: A gnat corrupted by the Haze infection. It is fragile, but its disarming boop can ruin a fight if it knocks your weapon away at the wrong moment.
behavior: It flies erratically around infected zones and often hovers over spore patches or around more dangerous infected creatures.
interactionWithPlayer: It harasses the player instead of finishing them by itself. Its main role is to interrupt, disarm, and leave you exposed to larger threats.
interactionWithCreatures: It moves freely around other infected creatures. Outside those groups, it tends to provoke hostile reactions if it gets too close to other species.
strategy: Do not ignore it in large fights. Even if it barely hurts you, losing your weapon or tool mid-fight is far worse than spending one quick hit to knock it down.
respawnInfo: 1 day by default. Outside the Haze it takes 3 days.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Disarming Boop: no reliable direct damage

specialTraits: It is immune to gas hazard. During the Infected Broodmother fight it eventually explodes like a larger infected bug.
